name_jp: $clip = Get-Clipboard; $arr = @(); foreach ($line in ($clip -split `r`n | ? { $_.trim() -ne  })) { $cols = $line -split `t; $n = $cols[0].Trim() -replace '',''; $s = if ($cols.Count -gt 1) { $cols[1].Trim() -replace '','' } else { 不明 }; $arr +=   { `name_jp`: `$n`, `status`: `$s` } }; $json = [`n + ($arr -join ,`n) + `n]; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($(Get-Location)\drugs.json, $json, (New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false))); git add .; git commit -m Perfect one shot; git push origin main; Write-Host 【完璧に完了しました】 -ForegroundColor Cyan
